msg: Control flow of non-void function ends here!
reasoning: When CONFIG_EP93XX_ETH is defined, ep93xx_alloc_buffers() (an int-returning function) only has a 'return 1' in the 'if (descs == NULL)' branch. When descs != NULL, control falls off the end of the function without returning a value — undefined behavior. This is a genuine control-flow bug. The presence condition [def(CONFIG_EP93XX_ETH)] is correctly constrained: the bug exists in all configurations where that macro is defined, regardless of CONFIG_ZONE_DMA. The vbdb entry (1f758a4) documents a BehaviorViolation for EP93XX_ETH && !ZONE_DMA (about __alloc_pages_nodemask returning NULL when asked for DMA), which is a separate issue from this missing-return bug. New true positive, correctly constrained.
